# humanvals

> Human feedback → verified agent memory. Python library: operator evaluations
> of agent outputs become retrievable prompt guidelines; every injection is
> exposure-logged; Wilson-bound promotion verifies impact before guidelines
> become permanent. Zero-dependency core, SQLite storage, FastAPI review
> server + React dashboard included.

Integration is two calls: `hv.guidelines(input, agent=...)` before generation
(append `.as_prompt()` to the system prompt), `hv.record_case(..., guidelines=gs)`
after. The same GuidelineSet MUST be passed to record_case — the exposure log
is how impact is measured.

## Docs

- [Agent integration guide](docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md): complete API with copy-paste
  recipes — read this first when integrating
- [HumanVals RFC](docs/HumanVals_RFC.md): the concept — cases, 4-dimension
  review, write-time curation, Wilson-bound promotion, known limitations
- [README](README.md): overview, install, dashboard, lifecycle table
- [ADRs](docs/adr/): all architecture decisions with rationale

## Examples (runnable without API keys)

- [Pydantic AI](examples/pydantic_ai_agent.py)
- [LangGraph](examples/langgraph_agent.py)
- [CrewAI](examples/crewai_agent.py)

## Related

- [Engram RFC v3](https://github.com/alinaqi/alinaqi/blob/main/docs/Engram_RFC_v3.md):
  the memory framework this builds on
